meta.name: Caseirices Premium Rustic-Glass System
meta.intent: B2B lead generation with premium local credibility

creativeDirection.northStar: Design should feel like a premium farm-to-shelf brand film frame, not a SaaS template.
principles: Lead with appetite appeal and product desirability before details.
Use strong typographic hierarchy with editorial headlines and compact supporting text.
Balance rustic warmth (earth tones, grain, organic photography) with clean modern structure.
Use glass layers only where needed for readability and depth over video imagery.
Every section must include a conversion cue, proof cue, or value cue.
Avoid playful rounded UI; keep geometry mostly crisp and professional.
Motion should feel premium and restrained: smooth reveals, subtle hover lift, no gimmicks.
antiPatterns: Over-animated elements that compete with conversion

grid.mobile: single-column stack with priority order: message > CTA > proof

sectionDensity.hero: 70vh target minimum on desktop; visually complete above the fold
sectionDensity.standardSections: 56-96px vertical padding depending on content density
sectionDensity.footer: compact but premium, clear legal + contact

shapeLanguage.cornerRadius: 0-4px default; avoid pill-heavy UI except badges/chips
shapeLanguage.borders: 1px visible borders for structure and premium framing
shapeLanguage.shadows: deep cinematic shadows on hero/media; softer depth on content cards

usageRules.headline: wine on light backgrounds, white on dark/video overlays
usageRules.ctaSecondary: transparent or light glass with dark text
usageRules.successMetrics: green accents for proof and ROI values
usageRules.overMedia: always add dark gradient + blur-backed containers for readability

gradients.heroOverlay: radial warm red + radial green + dark vertical cinematic gradient
gradients.mediaLegibility: top-to-bottom darkening gradient when text sits over image/video

rules: Headlines should break intentionally in 2-4 lines on desktop.
Use uppercase micro-labels for categories, chips, and metric captions.
Never let long paragraphs exceed ~70 characters line width in major sections.

imageryAndMedia.style: Real product photography, warm wood surfaces, ingredient context, high saturation control

heroVideo.contrastRequirement: text on top must meet strong readability with glass panel and dark mask

productCards.fit: cover for real photos, contain fallback for packshot placeholders

accessibility.reducedMotion: disable autoplay or heavy motion when prefers-reduced-motion is enabled

header.purpose: Immediate brand recognition + quick conversion entry
header.style: clean light strip over cinematic hero
notes: Button should be prominent but not overpower logo.

hero.purpose: Value proposition, emotional brand framing, first CTA
hero.style: full-bleed video background with glass content panel
hero.composition: Text block anchored left/centered, metrics compact, avoid excessive vertical stack
hero.height: desktop target 62-72vh, mobile auto with content-fit

ctaPrimary.style: solid tomato red, uppercase bold, white text, hard edge

chips.style: micro glass labels with fine border

benefitCards.style: light premium cards with subtle glow accents

productGrid.consistency: uniform card heights and image handling

trustSection.style: clean narrative card + structured proof bullets

roiCalculator.controls: range sliders with custom thumb and visible values
roiCalculator.results: three metric cards: monthly profit, payback, annual ROI
roiCalculator.ux: fast, visual, no legacy form aesthetics

instagramGrid.source: dynamic public profile fetch with fallback images
instagramGrid.ux: video badge when item is video

stickyCta.priority: always visible but should not hide essential content

footer.style: dark wine block with cream text

mobile.hero: keep headline impactful but reduce line count; CTA full-width

desktop.content: clear left-to-right scan path and sectional rhythm

implementationChecklist: Use brand tokens consistently; avoid ad-hoc colors.
Never place text directly over raw media without mask or glass panel.
Validate hero above-the-fold balance at 1366x768 and 1920x1080.
Keep primary CTA visible in hero without excessive scrolling.
Ensure contrast and readability in all glassmorphism layers.
Maintain conversion intent in every major section.
